title: AgentLogEvent
description: One structured log line emitted by a TDD-workflow role agent. The workflow is a relay of isolated-memory agents (FEIP-7510); each agent emits what it is doing so a centralized log (.tdd/agent-log.jsonl) reconstructs the whole run. Persisted as JSON Lines: one object per line.

level.description: debug = reasoning considerations; info = outputs/decisions; warn = smells/ambiguity surfaced; error = gate refusal/substrate failure.

event.description: Short machine-readable event name, dotted (e.g. phase.start, artifact.written, gate.surfaced, gate.approved, handoff, reasoning, smell.flagged).

feature_id.description: The feature this event scopes to (e.g. F1-initial-domain).

phase.description: Workflow phase, e.g. discovery, architectural-review, test-list-construction, implementation.

cycle_id.description: RED/GREEN/REFACTOR cycle id, when the event is cycle-scoped (navigator/driver).

data.description: Optional structured payload (artifact path, gate name, conformance violations, etc.).
